CVE-2021-23378.title: This affects all versions of package picotts. If attacker-control ...
CVE-2021-23378.description: This affects all versions of package picotts. If attacker-controlled user input is given to the say function, it is possible for an attacker to execute arbitrary commands. This is due to use of the child_process exec function without input sanitization.
